Design: Completely redesigned update dialog with animated gradient accents
New pulsing download icon with glow effects
Modernized changelog display with categorized sections
Added smooth indeterminate progress bar animation
Updated color palette to match new brand identity
Functionality: Added support for categorized release notes
Launcher now validates checksum before applying updates
Added session-based update skip so declined updates won't re-prompt
Mandatory updates now block the close button
Bug Fixes: Fixed issue with launcher not displaying the config.ini
Resolved crash when update server is unreachable
Fixed drag-to-move not releasing on rapid clicks
Corrected version comparison failing on hotfix builds
Performance: Reduced update check timeout from 10s to 5s
Optimized changelog rendering for large release notes
Decreased memory usage during zip extraction
Security: Added SHA256 checksum verification for downloaded packages
Implemented signature validation for update payloads
